What We Do

Our Services

From cozy bungalows to downtown storefronts, we tackle every pane with precision and care.

Residential Window Cleaning

Interior and exterior window cleaning for homes of all sizes. We bring the squeegees, ladders, and elbow grease — you enjoy the view.

Commercial Window Cleaning

Storefront and office building services that keep your business looking sharp. Flexible scheduling to minimize disruption.

Seasonal Packages

Spring refresh or fall prep — book a recurring schedule and save. Perfect for Ottawa's dramatic seasonal changes.

Screen & Track Cleaning

We don't just clean the glass — screens, tracks, and sills all get the warrior treatment. No detail goes unnoticed.

Post-Construction Cleanup

New build or renovation? We remove construction grime, paint overspray, and sticker residue from every window.

Gutter Cleaning

While we're up there, we'll clear your gutters too. Protect your home from water damage with a thorough cleanout.

Questions & Answers

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before booking with Window Warriors.

How much does window cleaning cost?▼
Pricing depends on the number of windows, storeys, and level of cleaning needed. Most residential jobs in Ottawa range from $100–$300. We provide free, no-obligation quotes so you know exactly what to expect.
How do I book an appointment?▼
Simply fill out our quote form or give us a call. We'll get back to you within 24 hours with a personalized quote and available time slots.
Do I need to be home during the cleaning?▼
For exterior-only cleaning, you don't need to be home. If we're cleaning interior windows as well, someone should be present to let us in.
What areas of Ottawa do you serve?▼
We cover all of Ottawa and surrounding areas including Kanata, Barrhaven, Orleans, Stittsville, Manotick, Nepean, Gloucester, Gatineau, and more.
What if it rains on my scheduled day?▼
Light rain doesn't affect quality since we use professional-grade solutions. For heavy storms, we'll reschedule at no extra charge.
Do you use eco-friendly products?▼
Absolutely. We use biodegradable, non-toxic cleaning solutions safe for your family, pets, and gardens.
How often should I get my windows cleaned?▼
We recommend at least twice a year — once in spring and once in fall. Commercial properties may benefit from quarterly cleaning.
